query:
UPDATE core.runs
            SET status = $2,
                last_heartbeat_at = NOW(),
                ended_at = CASE
                    WHEN $3::timestamptz IS NULL THEN ended_at
                    ELSE COALESCE(ended_at, $3::timestamptz)
                END
            WHERE id = $1::uuid
              AND status NOT IN ('failed', 'stopped')
